Mar 21

Meet Matthew Swinehart & Nola the Noble Corgi!

The book comes out March 10th — Nola arrives March 21st. Celebrate the brand-new release with author Matthew Swinehart and the real Nola, a certified therapy dog whose job is visiting hospital patients to bring them comfort and calm.

11:00 AM & 11:30 AM

Ages All ages

View All Events

Why Families Love Us

📚

Books Kids Actually Want to Read

Every book is handpicked to inspire wonder and adventure. From picture books to young adult novels, we curate stories that spark imagination and joy.

🎁

Personalized Recommendations

Not sure what to give? Our booksellers love helping families discover their next favorite read. Share interests, age, and reading level—we'll find the perfect match.

✨

A Place to Belong

More than a bookstore—we're building a community. Cozy reading nooks, friendly faces, and a warm atmosphere where families feel at home among stories.

Join Our Newsletter

Never miss a storytime, author visit, or special event. Our bi-monthly newsletter keeps you updated on upcoming events, what's next at The Wandering Lantern, and ways to be part of our community.

Join Our Newsletter

Our Story

Between Emily's lifelong love of literature and Michael's drive to build meaningful things, The Wandering Lantern came to life — a place built on stories, imagination, and community, glowing a little brighter each day.

Read Our Story

Send Us a Message

Have a question about our books? Curious about hosting an event? Just want to chat about a great story? Drop us a line.
